message:
fix(freeze): closure variable index mapping and performance optimizations

- Map bytecode var_ref indices to actual positions in closure_var_indices array
  (fixes path_trace SIGBUS crash when calling closure functions)
- Fix fclosure8 to use const_idx operand instead of u8
- Optimize get_arg to read directly from argv for read-only functions
  (only create arg_shadow when arguments are actually modified)
- Optimize emitCall to use direct @ptrCast instead of temp array conversion
- Remove debug prints from native_dispatch

path_trace benchmark now works. tail_recursive 7x faster (116ms -> 17ms).
